# WintAi

> WintAi is an AI-powered social media management platform that lets creators and agencies publish, schedule, and grow across every major social platform — YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, LinkedIn, X (Twitter), Threads, and Pinterest — with unlimited connected accounts, from a single dashboard. One video, one click, every platform, with AI captions, hashtags, and brand-voice adaptation for every channel.

WintAi is made for solo creators who don't have time to cross-post manually, and for agencies that manage many brands from one workspace with team permissions. Pricing starts free and scales to unlimited accounts on the Growth plan.

The live product is at https://www.wintaibot.com.

## What WintAi does

- **Multi-platform video publishing** — upload once, WintAi adapts format (vertical 9:16 for Reels/TikTok/Shorts, horizontal for YouTube, square for Facebook/LinkedIn), writes platform-specific captions + hashtags, and publishes.
- **AI Workspace** — three AI agents (Strategist, Writer, Analyst) draft content daily in your brand voice; approve with one click.
- **Viral Hooks** — 10 on-brand scroll-stopping openers generated per session, tuned to your niche.
- **Content Calendar** — drag-and-drop month view with holiday and awareness-day markers.
- **Brand Guardian** — live Reddit + X brand mention monitoring with sentiment tagging (no stored history bloat).
- **Growth Planner** — best-time-to-post forecasts from your actual audience, not generic "Tuesday 10am" advice.
- **Self-Healing Content** — detects underperforming posts, rewrites them in your current voice, and reschedules.
- **Workspaces** — each client / brand gets an isolated workspace with its own voice, posts, analytics, and permissions.
- **Ask AI** — brand-aware chatbot for 24/7 brainstorming.

## How it works

1. Connect your social accounts (up to 3 per platform on Pro, unlimited on Growth; OAuth via each platform's developer portal).
2. Upload a video or paste a URL.
3. WintAi processes variants per platform, generates captions in your brand voice, and shows a review screen.
4. Tick which accounts to post to (pool model — any account can publish to any workspace).
5. Publish now or schedule for later; WintAi tracks likes, comments, and views across every platform.

## Pricing

- **Free** — 1 account per platform, core tools.
- **Starter** — $19/month. 3 platforms, 100 scheduled posts.
- **Pro** — $39/month. 5 platforms, 3 accounts per platform, AI video variants, analytics.
- **Growth** — $79/month. All platforms, unlimited accounts, deep analytics, messages inbox.

All paid plans include a 7-day trial.

## Developer / technical

- Spring Boot 3 backend on AWS EC2 + RDS PostgreSQL + S3 for video storage.
- React frontend on AWS Amplify.
- OAuth 2.0 + PKCE for every social platform; per-user access tokens refreshed automatically.

## Company

WintAi was built by Wint Kay Thwe Aung (founder, @breezegirl6 on socials). Based in the US. Support email: `contact@wintaibot.com`.

## What WintAi is not

- Not a generic chatbot — AI is specifically tuned to a user's configured brand voice and writing style.
- Not a Buffer/Hootsuite clone — WintAi focuses on the video workflow: one upload, N platform formats, vs legacy tools that expect pre-edited clips for each channel.
- Not an enterprise-only product — free tier is usable by solo creators forever.
